name: io.github.pshkv/sint-mcp
title: SINT MCP
description: Security-first MCP proxy with policy enforcement, approvals, and audit receipts.

environmentVariables.name: SINT_MCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to a sint-mcp JSON config file.

environmentVariables.name: SINT_MCP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port used only when transport is sse.

environmentVariables.name: SINT_AGENT_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Ed25519 private key hex (optional; omit to auto-generate).
